company.name: Bicycle Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Bicycle peptide platform | Zelenectide mUC approval path rejected | Pivot to nuzefatide + radioconjugates

assets.name: Zelenectide pevedotin (BT8009) - Nectin-4 BDC
assets.stage: Phase 2/3 (Duravelo-2 mUC approval path rejected, dose selected)

market.notes: Duravelo-2 trial design NO LONGER acceptable as approval path per FDA (Mar 2026). 6mg dose selected with strong anti-tumor activity. Pivoting: Duravelo-3 (NECTIN4-amp breast cancer H2 2026 data), Duravelo-4 (NECTIN4-amp NSCLC). BDC = smaller than ADC, better tumor penetration.
First-in-class EphA2 BDC — historically undruggable target. Phase 1 nuzefatide + nivolumab in mUC data H1 2026. Phase 2 PDAC initiated. EphA2 broadly expressed across solid tumors.

BT1702: MT1-MMP targeting BRC with lead-212. EphA2 human imaging data expected H1 2026. UK NDA/NNL/SpectronRx partnerships for 212Pb supply. Company-sponsored BRC clinical trial (BT1702) expected 2027. Bicycle peptide = ideal radiopharma targeting vehicle.

assets.name: BT7480 - Bicycle TICA (Nectin-4 x CD137)
assets.stage: Phase 1 (to be out-partnered after H1 2026 data)

market.notes: Nectin-4 targeted CD137 agonist. Phase 1 combo data H1 2026. BCYC will seek partner after reporting — no longer developing internally. Platform validation but not core focus.
Bicycle peptides: fully synthetic, small molecule PK, biologic-like binding. Nobel Prize science (Sir Greg Winter). Partnerships in non-oncology. Platform optionality.

mega_bear.narrative: mUC dead + nuzefatide fails + BRC too early — Bicycle platform unproven
events: X Zelenectide mUC completely abandoned
X Nuzefatide EphA2 shows limited efficacy
X BRC radioconjugates face competition from established players
-> Cash burn continues, stock to $2-3 or reverse split territory

bear.narrative: Nuzefatide shows signal + BRC advancing but years from revenue
events: ~ Nuzefatide PDAC shows modest activity but not breakthrough
~ Zelenectide finds niche in NECTIN4-amplified breast cancer
~ BRC imaging data promising but clinical 2027+
-> Platform generates data but commercial path unclear

base.narrative: Nuzefatide validates EphA2 + BRC enters clinic + platform partnerships grow
events: V Nuzefatide Phase 2 PDAC encouraging — EphA2 validated
V Zelenectide finds path in NECTIN4-amplified tumors
V BRC radiopharma enters clinic 2027 — differentiated approach
V Platform generates 2+ new partnerships

bull.narrative: Bicycle platform vindicated — nuzefatide + BRC = new modality validated
events: V Nuzefatide best-in-class EphA2 — first approved BDC
V BRC radiopharma validated — Bicycle = ideal radiotargeting
V Platform licensed across oncology + non-oncology
V Stock recovers 5-10x from current levels

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Bicycle peptide = third major therapeutic modality alongside antibodies and small molecules
events: V Multiple approved BDC + BRC products
V Nobel Prize science (Greg Winter) finally commercialized
V Platform generates $5B+ in partnerships across 10+ programs
V Major pharma acquires for $5-10B

lastData.title: Duravelo-2 approval path rejected, pivoting to nuzefatide + BRC radiopharma
points: Zelenectide mUC: Duravelo-2 trial design no longer acceptable for approval (Mar 2026)
6mg dose selected — strong anti-tumor activity + differentiated safety
Nuzefatide (BT5528/EphA2): Phase 1 combo data mUC H1 2026, Phase 2 PDAC enrolling
BRC radioconjugates: EphA2 human imaging H1 2026, BT1702 (MT1-MMP) clinic 2027
BT7480 TICA: H1 2026 data then out-partnered
Stock crashed from $30+ to ~$5 on mUC setback

nextCatalyst.title: Nuzefatide mUC combo data + EphA2 imaging + zelenectide dose data presentation
thresholds: Nuzefatide + nivolumab Phase 1 mUC data H1 2026
EphA2 BRC human imaging data H1 2026
Zelenectide Duravelo-2 dose selection data at conference H1 2026
Duravelo-3 breast cancer initial data H2 2026

risks: Stock at $5 — effectively a turnaround/restructuring story
mUC approval path rejection is major strategic setback
Nuzefatide EphA2 is entirely unvalidated in Phase 2
BRC radiopharma 2+ years from clinical proof
ADC/BDC competition intense from established players
$360M market cap with $600M cash = negative enterprise value (market pricing in failure)
Platform has never produced an approved product in 15+ years
